title: Onboard a connected account (embedded)
description: Learn how to onboard a connected account using the embedded Account Onboarding component.

steps.title: Onboard a connected account
steps.description: Create a connected account and see how the embedded onboarding component collects identity verification details.

nodes.title: Create a connected account
nodes.description: On your server, create a connected account with the Express account type and request the transfers capability.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Render Account Onboarding component
nodes.description: Embed the Connect Account Onboarding component to collect identity verification and business details from the connected account.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.
